hero.description: Fity.ness is the workout app for those who want to stop guessing and start progressing. Log sets in seconds, track PRs automatically, and build the habit that takes you to the next level.

features.unlimited_workouts_description: Create as many workouts as you want, with customizable exercises, sets, and rest times.
features.automatic_prs_description: Your personal records are automatically detected during every session.
features.volume_by_group_description: See exactly how much volume each muscle group receives over time.
features.fast_to_use_description: Log sets in seconds during your workout. No distractions, just focus on what matters.

resources.custom_workouts_description: Create personalized routines by muscle group, with customizable sets, reps, and rest times.
resources.real_progress_description: Volume charts, automatic PRs, and week-over-week comparisons to visualize your evolution.
resources.smart_schedule_description: Schedule recurring workouts. Easily organize your routine week by week.
resources.drilldown_history_description: Everything grouped by workout: best volume, last session, and a complete history timeline.
resources.deep_analytics_description: Volume by muscle group, frequency, and total tonnage all in one place.
resources.no_ads_description: Clean interface, no ads, no noise. Just you and your data.

operation.description: From your first login to your first PR in less than a week. Fity.ness was built to stay out of your way.
operation.step_1_description: Add exercises, sets, and weights. Save templates to reuse whenever you want.
operation.step_2_description: Log weight and reps in seconds during your workout. No distractions, just focus on what matters.
operation.step_3_description: See PRs, volume, and trends. Adjust your routine based on facts, not guesswork.

skills.hypertrophy_description: Track weekly volume by muscle group and adjust your split to maximize gains.
skills.strength_description: Monitor PRs for each exercise and progress intelligently based on data.
skills.endurance_description: Log time under tension, sets, and weight progression over the weeks.

faq.q1: Do I need to pay to use it?
faq.a1: No. Fity.ness is 100% free. All features — workouts, history, schedule, and progress tracking — are available at no cost.
faq.a2: No. The interface is clean, completely ad-free, and has no pop-ups.
faq.a3: Yes. The interface was designed to be intuitive from the first use, allowing anyone to create and organize their workouts quickly and easily.
faq.q4: Do I need an internet connection to use it?
faq.a4: Yes. Fity.ness is a web app and requires a connection to log and sync your data.
faq.q5: What happens to my data if I stop using the app?
faq.a5: Your data remains securely saved in case you decide to come back. If you prefer, you can also request the permanent and definitive deletion of your account and workout history.

footer.description: Stop guessing and start progressing. Fity.ness is free to start.
